$comment: Layer B selection cases for REBATE vs the real GnuCOBOL harness image (file I/O stage 2b, docs/memory-layout.md). Each stdin line is a fixed 13-byte record: R-ID(4) R-AMOUNT 9(5)V99 (7) FILLER(2). The canonical multi-field defect is a field-offset error: candidate B decodes R-AMOUNT one byte early, so the misread slice (last digit of R-ID plus six amount digits) parses to a wrong value on every record. The empty file agrees by accident; a single record diverges. Cases cover the empty file (AT END on the first READ), a qualifying record, a below-threshold record, the 100.00 threshold boundary, a rounding half-boundary, and a typical batch.

legacy.label: COBOL 85 REBATE (GnuCOBOL via harness image legacymind/legacy-rebate, record-stream wrapper)
